# captureImage(in:completionHandler:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ ScreenCaptureKit ](/documentation/screencapturekit)

- [ SCScreenshotManager ](/documentation/screencapturekit/scscreenshotmanager)

-  captureImage(in:completionHandler:) 

Type Method# captureImage(in:completionHandler:)

Mac Catalyst 18.2+macOS 15.2+

```
class func captureImage(
    in rect: CGRect,
    completionHandler: (@Sendable (CGImage?, (any Error)?) -> Void)? = nil
)
```



```
class func captureImage(in rect: CGRect) async throws -> CGImage
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/ScreenCaptureKit/SCScreenshotManager/captureImage(in:completionHandler:)#parameters)

`rect`The rect for the region in points on the screen space for the screen shot, this is display agnostic and supports multiple displays

`completionHandler`Is the handler that will deliver the screenshot to the client

## [Discussion](/documentation/ScreenCaptureKit/SCScreenshotManager/captureImage(in:completionHandler:)#discussion)

captureImageInRect:completionHandler:

this method returns an image containing the contents of the rectangle in points, specified in display space
